article_act_code.COMMENT: Contains a list of values used to indicate an Act or Regulation. I.e. MA - Mines Act, HSRCM - Health, Safety and Reclamation Code for Mines in BC.

compliance_article.COMMENT: Contains a list of compliance sections as defined in a Legislative Act or Regulation; i.e. HSRC 1.2.2
